name: ml-master
description: Comprehensive machine learning expertise across training, evaluation, deployment, MLOps, data pipelines, fine-tuning, inference optimization, and cloud ML platforms. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) any ML task, (2) PyTorch/TensorFlow/JAX/scikit-learn/XGBoost/Hugging Face work, (3) SageMaker/Vertex AI/Azure ML/Databricks/Ray workflows, (4) model serving with Triton/ONNX/TensorRT/BentoML, (5) reproducibility, leakage, drift, monitoring, responsible AI, and cost optimization. Provides: best-practice guidance from data validation through production operations.
